product_description: an AI-powered marketing intelligence platform that helps growth teams optimize campaign performance and reduce wasted ad spend
opening: Hi {prospect_name}, this is Jordan calling from PulseIQ. I know you're busy, so I'll be direct: we help marketing teams cut wasted ad spend by an average of 35% in the first 60 days using AI-driven insights. Do you have three minutes to see if it's relevant for you?
value_propositions: Our clients reduce wasted ad spend by an average of 35% within the first 60 days
PulseIQ connects all your ad channels (Google, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok) into a single performance view with actionable recommendations you can act on immediately
Our AI identifies underperforming segments and reallocates budget in real time, so your team shifts focus from manual optimization to strategy

objection_handlers.price: I get it - every dollar counts in marketing spend. Here's what we typically see: the 35% reduction in wasted spend covers the platform cost within the first month, sometimes faster depending on your current ad volume. Would it help if I showed you a quick estimate based on your monthly spend?
objection_handlers.not_interested: Fair enough. Quick question though - how are you currently tracking performance across all your ad channels right now? That usually tells us fast whether there's even a conversation worth having.
objection_handlers.already_have_solution: Makes sense. Most of our best clients were using something else first. What's one thing your current tool doesn't do as well as you'd like? That tells us quickly if there's a real fit or not.
objection_handlers.no_time: Completely understand - I'll keep it brief. How about I send over a one-pager on how PulseIQ works, and we grab 15 minutes next week when things calm down?
objection_handlers.need_approval: Totally fair. If I draft a quick business case for your CMO or head of growth, what are the top two or three metrics they watch most closely? I want to make sure it lands right.
objection_handlers.data_privacy: Great question - we take that seriously. PulseIQ works with aggregated, anonymized performance data and is fully GDPR and CCPA compliant. We can walk your legal team through our data architecture before you decide anything.
objection_handlers.already_have_solution_detailed: A lot of our clients used tools like yours before switching. What's the biggest gap you're hitting with your current setup? Sometimes it's channel integration, sometimes it's the speed of optimization - but that gap usually tells us if we're worth talking to.
objection_handlers.busy_season: I know campaign season is chaos. Here's what I suggest - let me send a quick overview, and we can lock in just 15 minutes next week when you've got breathing room. Sound good?

closing: From what you've told me, PulseIQ could genuinely improve how efficient your campaigns run. The next step is a 30-minute technical discovery call - no sales pitch, just us getting to know your stack and confirming we're actually a good fit. Does that work for you?
